name: WordPress
description: 著名开源博客/CMS，自带 MariaDB,开箱即用。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: mariadb:11
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MARIADB_DATABASE: wordpress
      MARIADB_USER: wordpress
      MARIADB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      MARIADB_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD: "yes"
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/mysql]
  app:
    image: wordpress:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:80"]
    environment:
      WORDPRESS_DB_HOST: db
      WORDPRESS_DB_NAME: wordpress
      WORDPRESS_DB_USER: wordpress
      WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [app:/var/www/html]
volumes: {db: {}, app: {}}

name: Ghost
description: 现代化开源写作/发布平台,自带 MySQL。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: mysql:8
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_DATABASE: ghost
      MYSQL_USER: ghost
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      MYSQL_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD: "yes"
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/mysql]
  app:
    image: ghost:5-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:2368"]
    environment:
      database__client: mysql
      database__connection__host: db
      database__connection__user: ghost
      database__connection__password: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      database__connection__database: ghost
      NODE_ENV: production
    volumes: [content:/var/lib/ghost/content]
volumes: {db: {}, content: {}}

name: Wiki.js
description: 强大的开源 Wiki/知识库,自带 PostgreSQL。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: wiki
      POSTGRES_USER: wiki
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/requarks/wiki:2
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:3000"]
    environment:
      DB_TYPE: postgres
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_PORT: "5432"
      DB_USER: wiki
      DB_PASS: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      DB_NAME: wiki
volumes: {db: {}}

name: Umami
description: 隐私友好的开源网站统计分析,自带 PostgreSQL。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: umami
      POSTGRES_USER: umami
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/umami-software/umami:postgresql-latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:3000"]
    environment:
      DATABASE_TYPE: postgresql
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://umami:${DB_PASSWORD}@db:5432/umami
      APP_SECRET: ${APP_SECRET}
volumes: {db: {}}

name: Directus
description: 开源 headless CMS / 数据平台,自带 PostgreSQL。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: directus
      POSTGRES_USER: directus
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]
  app:
    image: directus/directus:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:8055"]
    environment:
      KEY: ${DIRECTUS_KEY}
      SECRET: ${DIRECTUS_SECRET}
      DB_CLIENT: pg
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_PORT: "5432"
      DB_DATABASE: directus
      DB_USER: directus
      DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      ADMIN_EMAIL: admin@example.com
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${ADMIN_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [uploads:/directus/uploads]
volumes: {db: {}, uploads: {}}

params.label: 管理员密码 / Admin Password (留空=随机)

name: NocoDB
description: 开源 Airtable 替代(在线表格/数据库),自带 PostgreSQL。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: nocodb
      POSTGRES_USER: nocodb
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]
  app:
    image: nocodb/nocodb:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:8080"]
    environment:
      NC_DB: "pg://db:5432?u=nocodb&p=${DB_PASSWORD}&d=nocodb"
      NC_AUTH_JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}
    volumes: [data:/usr/app/data]
volumes: {db: {}, data: {}}

name: Metabase

    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:3000"]
    environment:
      MB_DB_TYPE: postgres
      MB_DB_DBNAME: metabase

      MB_DB_USER: metabase
      MB_DB_PASS: ${DB_PASSWORD}

name: Mattermost
description: 开源团队协作/IM(Slack 替代),自带 PostgreSQL。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: mattermost
      POSTGRES_USER: mattermost
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]
  app:
    image: mattermost/mattermost-team-edition:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:8065"]
    environment:
      MM_SQLSETTINGS_DRIVERNAME: postgres
      MM_SQLSETTINGS_DATASOURCE: "postgres://mattermost:${DB_PASSWORD}@db:5432/mattermost?sslmode=disable"
    volumes: [data:/mattermost/data, config:/mattermost/config]
volumes: {db: {}, data: {}, config: {}}

description: 开源待办/项目管理(Todoist 替代),自带 PostgreSQL。
compose:
services:

    restart: unless-stopped

    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]

    restart: unless-stopped

      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_HOST: db
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_USER: vikunja
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_DATABASE: vikunja
      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}
      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_PUBLICURL: http://localhost:${HOST_PORT}
    volumes: [files:/app/vikunja/files]
volumes: {db: {}, files: {}}

name: Wallabag
description: 开源稍后读/文章存档(Pocket 替代),自带 MariaDB。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: mariadb:11
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MARIADB_DATABASE: wallabag
      MARIADB_USER: wallabag
      MARIADB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      MARIADB_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD: "yes"
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/mysql]
  app:
    image: wallabag/wallabag:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:80"]
    environment:
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_DRIVER: pdo_mysql
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_HOST: db
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_PORT: "3306"
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_NAME: wallabag
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_USER: wallabag
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      SYMFONY__ENV__DOMAIN_NAME: http://localhost:${HOST_PORT}
      SYMFONY__ENV__SECRET: ${APP_SECRET}
    volumes: [images:/var/www/wallabag/web/assets/images]
volumes: {db: {}, images: {}}

name: Docmost
description: 开源协作 Wiki / 文档(Confluence 替代),自带 PostgreSQL + Redis。
compose:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: docmost
      POSTGRES_USER: docmost
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [db:/var/lib/postgresql/data]
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes: [redis:/data]
  app:
    image: docmost/docmost:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [db, redis]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:3000"]
    environment:
      APP_URL: http://localhost:${HOST_PORT}
      APP_SECRET: ${APP_SECRET}
      DATABASE_URL: "postgresql://docmost:${DB_PASSWORD}@db:5432/docmost?schema=public"
      REDIS_URL: "redis://redis:6379"
    volumes: [storage:/app/data/storage]
volumes: {db: {}, redis: {}, storage: {}}

name: Baserow
description: 开源在线数据库/表格(Airtable 替代),内置数据库,单容器。

name: Trilium Notes
description: 开源层级式笔记/知识库,单容器。

name: Jaeger
description: 分布式链路追踪 UI + collector(all-in-one)。应用需接入 OpenTelemetry/Jaeger SDK 上报 span。

name: Grafana Tempo
description: 高扩展分布式追踪后端(OTLP 接收),配 Grafana 查询。

name: Grafana Loki
description: 日志聚合后端(配 Promtail 采集 + Grafana 查询)。轻量级日志检索另见内置「日志」页。

name: Coroot
description: eBPF 零侵入可观测(服务图/金信号/网络流/日志),自带 ClickHouse。
compose:
services:
  clickhouse:
    image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:24-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      CLICKHOUSE_DB: default
      CLICKHOUSE_USER: coroot
      CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD: ${CH_PASSWORD}
    volumes: [ch:/var/lib/clickhouse]
  coroot:
    image: ghcr.io/coroot/coroot:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on: [clickhouse]
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:8080"]
    command: ["--data-dir=/data", "--clickhouse-address=clickhouse:9000", "--clickhouse-user=coroot", "--clickhouse-password=${CH_PASSWORD}"]
    volumes: [data:/data]
  node-agent:
    image: ghcr.io/coroot/coroot-node-agent:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    privileged: true
    pid: host
    command: ["--collector-endpoint=http://coroot:8080", "--wal-dir=/tmp/coroot-node-agent"]
    volumes:
      - /sys/kernel/tracing:/sys/kernel/tracing:rw
      - /sys/fs/cgroup:/host/sys/fs/cgroup:ro
volumes: {ch: {}, data: {}}

name: OpenTelemetry Collector
description: OTLP 收集/处理/转发(可转发 trace 到 Aegis APM 或 Tempo/Jaeger)。
compose:
services:
  otelcol:
    image: otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports: ["${HOST_PORT}:4318", "4317:4317"]
    command: ["--config=/etc/otelcol/config.yaml"]
    volumes: [config:/etc/otelcol]
volumes: {config: {}}
